sections.paragraph:
fut. יֶהְדֹּף-

(1) to thrust, to push (Ch. הֲדַף id.; comp. דָּפָה, דָּפַק), Num 35:20, 22 Num 35:22 Eze 34:21. Job 18:18, יֶהְדְּפֻהוּ מֵאֹור אֶל־חשֶׁךְ “they shall thrust him from light into darkness;” hence, to thrust down, to prostrate (umftoßen), Jer 46:15.

(2) to repel, to thrust away (zurückftoßen), 2Ki 4:27 Pro 10:3.

(3) to expel (verftoßen, ausftoßen), Deu 6:19 9:4 Jos 23:5.
